title: Comparable
description: A market comparable in the HVOS Evidence Registry. Deliberately non-rigid: scoring weights, thresholds and source-quality mappings live in engine.evidence.config (configurable at runtime), NOT in this contract. reliability_score and inclusion_decision may be produced by automated scoring or replaced by professional judgment via manual_override. additionalProperties is allowed so engagements can carry extra evidence fields without a schema change.

comparable_id.description: Stable identifier for this piece of evidence.

source.description: Free-form source label (e.g. registry, broker, listing). Quality is mapped by a configurable lookup in engine.evidence.config, not hard-coded here.

date.description: Transaction/observation date. Recency is scored with a configurable half-life.

location_score.description: Locational proximity/quality. Accepts 0..1 or 0..100; the scorer normalises it.

reliability_score.description: Computed by engine.evidence.scoring.score_evidence(). Overridable; never the sole authority.

confidence_level.description: Banded confidence on reliability_score; band edges are configurable.

inclusion_decision.description: May be an automated decision against configurable thresholds, or a manual_override.

manual_override.description: Professional-judgment override. When present it wins over the automated decision, but the automated decision is still recorded for the audit trail.

rationale.description: Why the human overrode the automated result. Required so the override is explainable and auditable.
